hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -and ($file -match 'courses/.*\.(js|json)$')) { $root = (git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if ($root) { Set-Location $root }; $out = (npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $msg = "Course-data build FAILED for $file`n$out"; Write-Output ((@{ systemMessage = $msg }) | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) } }
